---
title: "ICE ERO-LESA detention data Nov. 2023-Feb. 2025"
author: "UWCHR"
date: "2025-03-25"
output:
    html_document:
        html_preview: true
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 3
        toc_float: true
        code_folding: hide
---


```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=TRUE}

options(scipen = 1000000)

library(pacman)

p_load(here, tidyverse, zoo, lubridate, ggplot2, plotly, gghighlight, viridis, readxl, digest, ggsankeyfier)

file <- "ice_detentions_nov23-oct25.csv.gz"

df <- read_delim(here('analyze', 'input', file), delim='|') %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  mutate(stay_book_in_date_time = ymd_hms(stay_book_in_date_time),
         book_in_date_time = ymd_hms(book_in_date_time),
         detention_book_out_date_time = ymd_hms(detention_book_out_date_time),
         stay_book_out_date_time = ymd_hms(stay_book_out_date_time),
         )

```

`detention_facility` == "ERO EL PASO CAMP EAST MONTANA"
`detention_facility_code` == "EROFCB"

```{r transfers_from_cscnwwa}

cscnwwa_transfers <- df %>% 
  filter(detention_facility_code == "CSCNWWA",
         detention_release_reason == "Transferred")

cscnwwa_transfer_destinations <- cscnwwa_transfers %>% 
  count(next_facil) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n))

p1 <- cscnwwa_transfers %>% 
  filter(detention_book_out_date_time >= "2025-01-01") %>% 
  mutate(week = floor_date(detention_book_out_date_time, "week", "Monday")) %>% 
  count(week, next_facil) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = n, fill = next_facil)) +
  geom_area() +
  gghighlight(next_facil == "EROFCB")

p1

```

```{r direct_transfers_cscnwwa_to_erofcb}

erofcb_from_cscnwwa <- df %>% 
  filter(detention_facility_code == "EROFCB",
         prev_facil == "CSCNWWA") %>% 
  mutate(type = "transfer to EROFCB")

other_transfers_from_cscnwwa <- df %>% 
  filter(detention_facility_code != "EROFCB",
         prev_facil == "CSCNWWA") %>% 
  mutate(type = "all other transfers")

cscnwwa_transfers_by_type <- rbind(erofcb_from_cscnwwa, other_transfers_from_cscnwwa)

first_cscnwwa_to_erofcb <- min(erofcb_from_cscnwwa$detention_book_out_date_time, na.rm=TRUE)

cscnwwa_top_citizenship <- df %>% 
  filter(detention_facility_code == "CSCNWWA",
    detention_book_out_date_time >= first_cscnwwa_to_erofcb) %>%
  distinct(unique_identifier, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  count(citizenship_country) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n))

dat <- cscnwwa_transfers_by_type %>% 
  mutate(citizenship_country = case_when(citizenship_country %in% head(cscnwwa_top_citizenship$citizenship_country, 10) ~ citizenship_country,
                                          TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(type, citizenship_country)

p1 <- dat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = type, y = n, fill = citizenship_country)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill")
  
p1

# erofcb_from_cscnwwa %>% 
#   count(next_facil)
# 
# erofcb_from_cscnwwa %>% 
#   count(stay_release_reason)

p2 <- cscnwwa_transfers_by_type %>% 
  count(type, next_facil) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = type, y = n, fill = next_facil)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill")

ggplotly(p2)

p3 <- cscnwwa_transfers_by_type %>% 
  count(type, stay_release_reason) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = type, y = n, fill = stay_release_reason)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill")

ggplotly(p3)

```
